reason: Successfully navigated to the Super Agent app, located and opened the QA-20260330-183856-jjvr agent, verified idle status, sent a math question, and received correct response mentioning "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with agent list displayed in sidebar and main area
Found and clicked the "QA-20260330-183856-jjvr" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened showing the agent name and "idle" status indicator
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status confirmed as "idle" in the top header of the agent page
Clicked on the message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message entered successfully in the landing-message-input field
Clicked the send button to submit the message - Message sent, agent status changed to "working", and new session "Basic Math Question Session" created with chat view displayed
Waited for agent response (timeout: 3 minutes) - Response received within approximately 2 seconds

Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Agent response clearly displays "4" on the left side of the chat, with "Worked for 2s" timestamp below it, confirming correct answer to the math question
